name: Inmune Bio, Inc.
summary: Our Strategy Company Overview INmune Bio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing and commercializing a pipeline of product candidates designed to reprogram the innate immune system. Our mission is to address a broad range of diseases where chronic inflammation and immune dysfunction are primary drivers of pathology.
